Bio

Mela graduated in 2011 from Central Saint Martins College of Art & Design in London, having previously studied at the Academy of Fine Arts in Warsaw, Poland. Mela is the winner of the Cass Art Painting Prize 2011. Polish-born, she now lives and works in East London. Mela exhibited in solo and group shows, art fairs, and collaborated in art projects in the UK, Poland, Sweden, Italy, Austria, Germany, Romania, and the Netherlands.

Mela collaborates with Maria Stenfors.

SOLO SHOWS

2016 Liaisons / Century Club / London Mela Yerka / Kamarade / Stockholm

2014 And the — the Surface is Fine and Powdery / Maria Stenfors / London

2013 What Red Blue is in? / Maria Stenfors / London
